personal.name: Aditya Mishra
personal.title: Full Stack Developer
personal.bio: Full-Stack Developer skilled in Java, React.js, and .NET Core with hands-on experience building scalable applications. Strong foundation in DSA and system design, backed by competitive programming expertise and real-world project delivery.

projects.title: PlayTracker
projects.description: A web-based cricket scoreboard management application that allows users to track live match scores, manage teams, and view player statistics efficiently.

projects.title: Capstone Project Management System
projects.description: A web-based system for managing college capstone projects, allowing students and mentors to track tasks, submit updates, and collaborate efficiently in real-time.

projects.title: MedicPulse
projects.description: A patient management application allowing users to register, book, and manage appointments efficiently, with real-time SMS notifications and secure file uploads.

experience.description: Developed and optimized full-stack web applications, enhancing performance and user experience through efficient coding and scalable solutions.
Contributed to end-to-end software development by implementing features, fixing bugs, and collaborating on real-world projects using modern technologies.
